reviews.review_description: Quick to pick up and play. Good for when you don't want to play anything serious or tiresome. There's a speed limit for how fast you can slam those slimes, making the interactions feel less than snappy.

[Product received for free]
Fun and challenging arcade experience. It reminds me of Air Hockey, but on the moon. The craterous terrain gives the ball all sorts of action that's difficult to master. 

Don't expect more than you see in the trailer, but if you're looking for a satisfying game to spend time mastering, Moon Slime might be it.

reviews.review_title: Arcade fun, but not much in it
reviews.review_description:
[Recived this product for free]
Have you ever wondered what it would be like to play something sorta like Tennis while at the same time beating the ever-living crap outta some slimes? This is that game. A high score challenge that's all about smashing jelly-like Bois into flag poles, but if the install size doesn't give it away, this game is mostly skin and bones, there's not that much here. Sure the power-ups are fun, and the gameplay is pretty novel, but the novelty wears off with time. Don't get me wrong, I still enjoyed this game, it's just that a single-player-only game that repeats itself over and over again can get pretty boring.

Still, nice game, very cool.

reviews.review_title: Fun fun fun fun fun more please
reviews.review_description:
First , thank you developers for the fun game , I enjoy playing it . 
This is a creative game , and happy game to play. 
 More please, more new maps , new play area , suggestion water ball game playing in swimming pool if good idea.   More colorful upgradeable player if possible. 
I do recommend this game to everyone to enjoy.  And more please . Thank you

For the price, it's a good fun little game to mess around in. It does sometimes feel difficult trying to predict where the slimes will go, but it can add a bit of chaos of that's what you find more fun. I smacked a piece of furniture trying to hit one of the 4 balls flying around ha. I like that it throws you right into the game. Easy to pick up and play without having to go through a bunch of menus.

Got a free key to test. 

 Feels kind of like nock meets air hockey in that you’re frantically chasing bouncing balls in an arena often behind you or out of sight. 

Is pretty simple from what I see and is priced appropriately.

Fun arcade game that will make you move around surprisingly a lot. The physics is little unpredictable in this game but it is fun to try to hit the little creatures and send them towards opposing flags. It is colorful and cute and it would be great if there were few more environments. 
The play area the game requires is quite big though. Maybe allowing the players to shrink it a bit would not be a bad idea.
Great game here - very much recommend going out of your way to try it out!  You will NOT be disappointed!!

It's a fun game. You just smack slimes back and forth against an enemy AI.  They are pretty good too. 

I only wish I could shrink the arena since my playspace is really small.  Maybe make my "hands" small so it stays balanced.

This game feels inspired by pong, but there can be more than one ball in play. Graphically, it looks decent, it has a cartooney look to it.

Fun in short bursts, but sometimes it doesn't feel like you can control the trajectory of the balls.

I enjoyed this game a lot and it entertained me very well. It was a nice break from most vr games that try to do things that the quest 2 isn’t ready for and over complicate the game. This is a great, fun, simple game to just relax and play. I hope in the future more content will be added, like possibly difficulties and levels.

It's a lot of fun trying to track the different balls, and flailing away with both hands. Very easy to pick up, and I suspect, will take a while to master. I did keep hitting the joystick and changing the height by accident. 

Looking forward to playing the game more!

reviews.review_title: Fun but be aware of your surroundings!
reviews.review_description:
Got a free key to test.
For the price I believe it to be a pretty cute and fun arcade game to have fun with, it can get pretty hectic and you get to spread your arms a lot and really use up your space which brings the importance of being very aware of your surroundings as I personally bonked the wall at least once of twice! That being said it's very fun to feel so free to use your space in the game, grabbing powerups and doing my best to overwhelm the adversary.

Theres definitely a learning curve but its still fun! Low gravity volleyball where you have to players. Each hand is a player! And you know what i gotta give the dev props he gave me a free key for this! So and extra star for that! Would like to see some multiplayer in the future.

reviews.review_title: Fun wee game, crazy tennis with aliens!
reviews.review_description: Great fun wee game. Tennis like but can have several balls in play at once plus other bonuses appear. Enjoying it so far

This is the classic game you want to play after a tired day of work, I find it entertaining and addictive. My only complaint is with the wider game area, I hit the wall of my room numerous times so maybe a less wider map can be pleasant
